creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
Outdated information in "1.2.1. What Can FreeBSD Do?"

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/nutshell.html 

We have new features like SMP, Memory protection, and even Preemptive multitasking!

We should likely add things like zfs, vmnet, or whatnot.
